name: Dumbbell Bench Press
instructions: Lie on a flat bench holding a dumbbell in each hand at chest level. Press the dumbbells up until your arms are fully extended above your chest. Lower the dumbbells slowly until your elbows are at about 90 degrees, feeling a stretch in your chest. Press back up, squeezing your chest at the top. Keep your shoulders pinned to the bench throughout.
form_cues: Keep your wrists straight and aligned with your elbows
Maintain a natural arch in your lower back
Lower the dumbbells to chest level, not higher
Don't let the dumbbells drift outward or inward unevenly
safety_notes: Use a spotter for heavier sets. Don't drop the dumbbells to the floor; rest them on your thighs and sit up carefully. If you feel shoulder pain, reduce the depth or switch to a neutral-grip (palms facing each other).
